title: The Passport (Amendment) Rules, 1976 (20.03.1976)
text: REGISTERED No. D-(D)-72 The Gazette of India EXTRAORDINARY PART II—Section 3—Sub-section (i) PUBLISHED BY AUTHORITY No. 108] NEW DELHI, MONDAY, MARCH 21, 1976/CHAITRA 18, 1898 Separate paging is given to this Part in order that it may be filed as a separate compilation MINISTRY OF EXTERNAL AFFAIRS NOTIFICATION New Delhi, the 20th March 1976 G.S.R. 247 (E).—In exercise of the powers conferred by section 24 of the passports Act, 1967 (15 of 1967), the Central Government hereby makes the following rules further to amend the Passports Rules, 1967, namely:— 1. (1) These rules may be called the Passports (Amendment) Rules, 1976. 2. In Schedule I to the Passport Rules, 1967, in the entries against No. 10, after Gazette. 2. In Schedule 1 to the Passport Rules, 1967, in the entries against No. 10, after item (c) and the entries relating thereto, the following items and entries shall been inserted, namely:— (2) "(d) Judicial Secretary, Andaman and Nicobar Administration. Port Blair (e) Assistant Secretary (Confidential Cell), Anda- man and Nicobar Administration, Port Blair, (3) Do. Do." [No. V. 1/401/69/75] K. R. NARAYANAN, Addl, Secy. (857) -- 1 of 2 -- 858 THE GAZETTE OF INDIA EXTRAORDINARY [PART II—SEC. 3(I)] PRINTED BY THE GENERAL MANAGER, GOVERNMENT OF INDIA PRESS, MINTO ROAD. NEW DELHI AND PUBLISHED BY THE CONTROLLER OF PUBLICATIONS, DELHI. 1 9 7 8 -- 2 of 2 --
